score_run.notes: Carpet cleaning NAICS 561740 TX run. Aggressive franchise exclusion (Stanley Steemer/Chem-Dry/Zerorez/COIT/ServiceMaster/Servpro/Heaven's Best/Oxi Fresh/Rainbow/Anago/Restoration 1 all dropped). 80-business spine consolidated from 13 expertise.com TX city pages (Houston, Dallas, Austin, Fort Worth, San Antonio, Plano, Frisco, McKinney, Arlington, Katy, Sugar Land, Round Rock, The Woodlands) + Google-search verification. Live-fetched home page for top-tier candidates; verified IICRC and named owner where possible. Comptroller AJAX-form not directly fetchable — flagged as partial source.

businesses.employee_count_source: owner-operator + small crew per website language ('Harley personally oversees every job')
businesses.owner_age_source: license_tenure_proxy + industry_tenure (30+ yrs in industry per published bio)

data_sources.url: https://harpercarpet.com/about-us/ (404 on direct fetch — content surfaced via Google snippet)

raw_enrichment.service_area: Austin + Hill Country (Driftwood, Kyle, Fischer, Canyon Lake, Johnson City, Wimberley)
raw_enrichment.pricing_model: $.36/sqft commercial — published rate-card on site (signals direct-to-customer, no broker)

signals.evidence: Harley Harper published bio states 30+ yrs in carpet cleaning industry — implies age 50-60 (started early adulthood). Confidence medium without OV65/voter cross-check.
Harley Harper is IICRC certified in both carpet cleaning AND water damage restoration — top-tier industry credential. Verified via Yelp + harpercarpet.com.
Company founded 1997 per website + Google snippet. 29 yrs of operation = settled, SBA-financeable.

Live homepage at https://harpercarpet.com/ (fetched 2026-05-16) emphasizes 'Harley personally oversees every job' — sole listed practitioner. About page returned 404 (couldn't deep-cross-check); confidence capped at medium. No second IICRC certified individual named, no associate/partner/manager named, no family successor language.
Quote-form only intake, no calendar/online booking. Phone-and-form workflow indicative of pre-modern operations.
Copyright shows 2025 — site is being maintained, not abandoned. Reduces 'dated website' coasting tell.
Austin/Travis is hot for service-business roll-ups; carpet+restoration combo is SBA 7(a) financeable; ETA appetite medium-high for recurring-contract floor-care.

businesses.layer1_comment: Harley Harper, ~55 (industry tenure proxy — 30 yrs in industry per published bio), founded Harper Carpet Care in 1997 and has personally operated it for 29 yrs. Solidly in early-natural-exit window though not yet OV65. Confidence medium — need OV65 or voter DOB to confirm.
businesses.layer2_comment: 29 yrs in business, IICRC dual-cert (carpet + water damage = the gold standard), 269+ Yelp reviews, commercial pricing published at $0.36/sqft = direct-to-customer model. Owner-operator + small crew. SBA-size estimate: $300K-$600K revenue (solo + 1-2 techs). Not multi-truck operation but financeable.
businesses.layer3_comment: Coasting tells: (1) no online booking — quote-form/phone only; (2) sole listed practitioner per live site fetch — no associate/manager/successor; (3) owner emphasizes 'personally oversees every job' — bottleneck pattern of late-tenure solo owner. Counter-signals: copyright 2025 (site maintained), 269 reviews still active (engaged). Coasting + tired, not coasting + abandoned. 3 strong tells = mid-60s.
businesses.layer4_comment: Austin/Travis hot metro for service-business roll-ups. Carpet cleaning + IICRC water-damage cert combo is SBA 7(a) financeable and attractive to ETA buyers seeking recurring + emergency revenue. No public carpet-cleaning roll-up platform like Authority Brands' Chem-Dry has hit Austin's independents heavily yet.
businesses.final_comment: Harley Harper, ~55 (industry-tenure proxy), founded Harper Carpet Care in 1997 (29 yrs) — owner-operator IICRC dual-certified (carpet + water damage) in Austin/Hill Country. Live homepage (harpercarpet.com fetched 2026-05-16) shows 'Harley personally oversees every job' with no associate or family successor named; copyright 2025 = site still maintained, 269+ Yelp reviews. Three coasting tells (no online booking, solo bottleneck, late-tenure pattern) but counter-signal of active maintenance. Cap at B_forward — verified owner age via OV65 + Comptroller status check would unlock A. Solid forward-target for the ETA community.
businesses.value_add_thesis: Add online booking (Jobber/Housecall Pro), add a second IICRC-certified senior tech to break owner-operator bottleneck, build out a recurring commercial property-management contract pipeline (Hill Country STR cleaning + Westlake commercial corridor), and pursue an IICRC Master Textile Cleaner cert for high-end rug margin. 1.4-1.7× EBITDA path in 18-24 months.

CAVEAT: William Wolfe surfaces in LinkedIn search snippet as also-listed-Owner at Aladin — could not directly verify (LinkedIn 999/403). If William Wolfe is a son/brother actually in the business, this would be a successor candidate. Logged as ambiguity.
Website copyright 2018 — 8 years stale. Strong dated-website coasting tell.
18 Yelp reviews across 28 yrs ≈ minimal residential-funnel investment. Owner has stopped pushing the digital channel.
Conroe / Montgomery County = N Houston suburban growth zone. Carpet cleaning rollups (Chem-Dry / ServiceMaster) active. SBA 7(a) easy fit.

businesses.layer1_comment: Charles Wolfe, ~58-62 (28-yr business-tenure proxy — started Aladin 1998), still owner-operator. Approaching natural-exit window. Confidence medium — no OV65 / voter / DMV verification done.
businesses.layer2_comment: 28 yrs operating, suite-address suggests >1 truck, toll-free line suggests commercial reach. But low Yelp velocity (18 reviews in 28 yrs) limits visibility — small operation in $300K-$700K revenue band. Real and clean.
businesses.layer3_comment: Strong coasting tells: (1) website copyright 2018 = 8-yr-old design, (2) low review velocity = no digital push, (3) live about-us shows sole listed principal. Caveat: ambiguous LinkedIn snippet about a William Wolfe also listed as owner — could be a successor; flagged for deep-dive verification. Conservatively scoring on what live-fetch confirms.
businesses.layer4_comment: Montgomery County / N Houston suburb sees carpet-cleaning roll-up activity (Chem-Dry, ServiceMaster Clean franchises buying small competitors). SBA 7(a) financeable. Carpet+restoration combo modestly attractive.
businesses.final_comment: Charles Wolfe, ~58-62 (28-yr-tenure proxy), founded Aladin Carpet Cleaning in Conroe in 1998 — 28 yrs owner-operator, copyright 2018 site (8 yrs stale), 18 Yelp reviews across the lifespan = digital channel abandoned. Live About page (aladincarpetcleaning.com/about-us/, fetched 2026-05-16) names only Charles Wolfe; HOWEVER a Google LinkedIn snippet surfaces William Wolfe also identified as 'Owner — Aladin Carpet Cleaning' which LinkedIn 403/999'd preventing direct verification. If William is a son/sibling actually in the business, that's a successor candidate that demotes the read. Cap at B until LinkedIn cross-check completes. Forward to ETA community with the William Wolfe ambiguity flagged.
businesses.value_add_thesis: Modernize the public site (long overdue), wire up Jobber/Housecall Pro online booking, push a Google-review campaign (only 18 reviews across 28 yrs = massive headroom), and expand into property-management + apartment-turn commercial routes in the Woodlands/Conroe growth corridor. 1.5-2× EBITDA in 18-24 months.

signals.evidence: Mundae 'family owned 30+ yrs' per Google narrative. Founder/President Ron Saar (per Google search snippet sourced from BBB profile — could not directly verify, BBB 403'd). Tenure proxy ~55.

Live About page at https://mundae.com/about-us/ (fetched 2026-05-16) confirms 'family-owned' but does NOT name principals — neither Ron Saar nor Lauren Saar appears in directly-fetched content. However, Google search snippet (sourced from BBB profile, also 403'd) reports 'President Ron Saar' and 'VP Lauren Saar' — implying a structured family-VP succession (likely father-daughter or husband-wife) ALREADY IN PLACE. Per the verifying-no-successor protocol, since the live About page itself doesn't show this, AND the snippet implies a structured next-gen owner, the safer read is: structured internal-buy-in candidate, NOT coasting-solo-to-outside. Demote L3.
Copyright 2026 — site fresh, not abandoned.
Harris County / Houston = top TX market for restoration + carpet roll-up. Belfor, Pye-Barker (recently expanded to carpet via Authority Brands), ServiceMaster all active.

businesses.layer1_comment: Ron Saar (per BBB snippet — unverified on direct fetch), ~55, founded Mundae 30+ yrs ago. Approaching natural-exit window but younger than ideal. Confidence low-medium.
businesses.layer2_comment: 30+ yrs, 2-branch Houston operation, 300+ reviews, 24/7 emergency response, licensed + insured. Multi-truck. Strong SBA-financeable size ($1.5M-$3M estimate). Carpet + full restoration = high-quality target.
businesses.layer3_comment: DEMOTED for successor signal. Google BBB snippet implies VP Lauren Saar (likely daughter/wife) already in structured second-position role = internal-buy-in candidate, not coasting-solo-to-outside. Plus 2026 copyright (site fresh), 300+ reviews active = engaged owner. Successor verification flagged: live About page doesn't confirm Saar names, but the snippet was specific enough to warrant caution. Per protocol, where a successor candidate is plausibly identified via cross-check, cap L3 low.
businesses.layer4_comment: Harris/Houston is top TX restoration + carpet roll-up metro. Multi-truck restoration shops with carpet attached are exactly the Authority Brands / Pye-Barker / Belfor target profile.
businesses.final_comment: Mundae Cleaning & Restoration Services Inc, Houston SW (6101 Maple St) + Downtown branch, 30+ yrs, 300+ reviews, 24/7 restoration. Site is fresh (©2026). Google search snippet (from BBB 403'd) reports Ron Saar President + Lauren Saar VP — structured succession likely IN PLACE; the live About page doesn't itself name them, but per verifying-no-successor protocol the cross-check ambiguity caps L3 LOW. Final 60 = B_forward, not A. Forward to ETA / search community with the 'verify Saar succession' note as the first deep-dive item.
businesses.value_add_thesis: Already large + recurring — primary thesis is route optimization on the restoration emergency side (FieldRoutes / ServiceTitan migration), commercial property-management portfolio expansion in SW Houston (Westchase/Sharpstown/Bellaire corridor), and a tuck-in M&A play of 2-3 single-truck Houston independents to reach $5M+ rev. ETA-friendly.
